src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/StackA.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import path to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/StackA.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was moved to org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure.LiquibaseProperties in Spring Boot 4, causing a compile error if not updated.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Update Spring Boot auto-configuration import paths to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: The classes `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer` and `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer` do not exist in Spring Boot 4; they have been moved to `org.springframework.boot.cache.autoconfigure` and `org.springframework.boot.hibernate.autoconfigure` respectively, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation for Spring Boot 3/4 and Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17+ with Spring Boot 3/4.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace JHipster-specific profile constant with a project-specific constant to decouple from JHipster configuration classes.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: The class `JHipsterConstants` may be removed or relocated in newer JHipster/Spring Boot versions, causing a compile error if the constant is not available.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated MvcRequestMatcher with direct string patterns in SecurityFilterChain configuration.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: MvcRequestMatcher is deprecated in Spring Security 6.1+ and removed in later versions; using it causes compilation errors or deprecation warnings that break strict builds.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add explicit authentication entry point configuration within oauth2ResourceServer block.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: Spring Security 6+ requires explicit configuration of entry points within the resource server block to ensure proper JWT error handling.
